summary: Phase 19 Video Launch Screen testing completed successfully. All core features verified and working: intro screen appears on cold launch with expo-video playing fullscreen video (black background), skip button exists with testID='intro-skip-btn' and functions correctly, 5-second auto-navigation works, module-level flag ensures intro only shows on cold launch, full navigation flow operational (intro → login → dashboard). Backend static video endpoint /api/static/intro.mp4 returns 200 and serves 1.3MB video file. No crashes or critical errors detected.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ intro.tsx correctly implemented with expo-video v3.0.16 (useVideoPlayer + VideoView)
✓ Video source: web uses ${EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL}/api/static/intro.mp4, native uses require('../assets/videos/intro.mp4')
✓ Video plays muted, fullscreen, no controls (nativeControls={false}, contentFit='cover')
✓ Skip button positioned correctly (top-right) with testID='intro-skip-btn' and proper hitSlop
✓ Module-level flag '_navigated' prevents double navigation within intro screen
✓ Module-level flag 'introShown' in index.tsx controls cold launch display
✓ Navigation flow: index.tsx (introShown=false) → /intro → index.tsx (introShown=true) → auth check → /login or /(tabs)
✓ Backend serves video via FastAPI StaticFiles at /api/static with correct content-type (video/mp4)
✓ Video file exists in both /app/backend/static/intro.mp4 (1.3MB) and /app/frontend/assets/videos/intro.mp4
✓ _layout.tsx correctly configured with Stack.Screen for /intro with fade animation
seed_data_creation: No new test data created. Used existing test account (Adv. Priya Sharma, phone 9876543210, OTP 123456).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 19 Video Launch Screen fully implemented and tested. Uses expo-video package (v3.0.16) to play intro.mp4 on cold launch. Video served from backend /api/static/intro.mp4 for web, local asset for native. Module-level flag 'introShown' in index.tsx controls display (resets on cold launch only). Skip button works, 5s timer works, navigation flow intact. Test account 9876543210/123456 logs in successfully after intro. All features working with no issues.
features_verified: ✓ Backend: /api/static/intro.mp4 endpoint returns 200 with video/mp4 content-type
✓ Backend: Video file size 1.3MB served correctly
✓ Cold launch shows intro screen with black background
✓ Skip button appears immediately in top-right corner
✓ Skip button is tappable and triggers navigation
✓ Navigation after skip: intro → index → login screen
✓ 5-second auto-navigation works (timer completes → navigates to login)
✓ Login screen loads correctly after intro
✓ Full login flow works: Phone 9876543210 → OTP 123456 → Dashboard
✓ Dashboard loads showing 'Good Evening, Adv. Priya...' with stats
✓ Intro does NOT appear on warm navigation (direct /login access)
✓ Intro DOES appear on page reload (cold launch behavior correct)
✓ Module-level flag 'introShown' prevents re-showing on subsequent navigations
✓ No video loading errors or expo-video errors in console
✓ No React Native red screen errors
✓ No runtime crashes during video playback or navigation

expo-notifications not fully supported on web (existing limitation, not related to Phase 19)
props.pointerEvents deprecated (React Native web compatibility warning, non-critical)
useNativeDriver not supported on web (expected, falls back to JS-based animation)

technical_implementation_notes.module_flag: introShown (resets on JS module reload / cold launch)
